EXPLANATION: The paper exists with both Thomas S Richardson and James M Robins as authors. Multiple sources confirm this work was published in 2013 by the Center for Statistics and the Social Sciences at the University of Washington, matching the cited reference exactly.

LINK: https://csss.uw.edu/research/working-papers/single-world-intervention-graphs-swigs-unification-counterfactual-and

FOUND_TITLE: Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality

FOUND_AUTHORS: Thomas S Richardson, James M Robins

FOUND_YEAR: 2013
